description: Dot-identifier respondent primitive combined with a postfix schedule-level annotation. Verifies the dotted-identifier grammar (Pair.ForwardDelay) composes cleanly with the @-prefixed annotation grammar, including DISTRIBUTION_NAME lexemes (exponential) appearing as annotation values.
_note: The dot-identifier respondent primitive and the postfix @annotation compose via the shared _parse_schedule path. DISTRIBUTION_NAME (cross-layer lexeme) is accepted at annotation-value position as a plain string.

description: Pair.Backward with a trailing @iti annotation — the specific case called out in the parser follow-up. Pair.Backward takes (us, cs, isi=...) positional order.
_note: uniform is a DISTRIBUTION_NAME lexeme; the annotation-value path stringifies it.
